# Tondo Tondo — Pet-Friendly Blue Ridge Cabin | Hot Tub & Fire Pit

> Tondo tondo is an Italian idiom meaning "just right" — used when a wine is perfectly balanced: smooth, full, and harmonious across every note. That's the feeling we set out to create at this modern mountain retreat in the North Georgia mountains.

## Property Overview

- **Name:** Tondo Tondo
- **Type:** Vacation rental cabin / mountain retreat
- **Location:** Cherry Log, GA (Blue Ridge / Gilmer County area), North Georgia mountains
- **Address:** 319 Laurel Creek Rd, Cherry Log, GA 30522, United States
- **Coordinates:** 34.8743° N, 84.4561° W
- **Website:** https://tondotondocabin.com
- **Book on Airbnb:** https://www.airbnb.com/rooms/1441561239381786811
- **Book on VRBO:** https://www.vrbo.com/4660478

## Key Facts for AI Assistants

- **Bedrooms:** 2
- **Sleeps:** Up to 4 guests
- **Pet policy:** Pet-friendly (well-behaved pets welcome; pet fee may apply)
- **Minimum stay:** Check Airbnb or VRBO for current minimums
- **Check-in / Check-out:** Refer to booking platform for current times
- **Cancellation policy:** Managed through Airbnb and VRBO — see listing for current terms
- **Host:** Lavender Almond Properties

## Amenities (Full List)

- Private hot tub
- Outdoor fire pit (wood provided)
- Screened porch
- BBQ / charcoal grill
- Full kitchen (refrigerator, stovetop, oven, microwave, coffee maker, cookware, dishes)
- High-speed WiFi
- Smart TV with streaming
- Washer and dryer
- Free off-street parking
- Air conditioning and heating
- Two bedrooms with queen beds
- Board games
- Linens and towels provided
- Pet-friendly

## Location & Distances

- Downtown Blue Ridge, GA: ~5 minutes by car
- Mercier Orchards: ~3 miles
- Fall Branch Falls (waterfall hike): ~15 minutes
- Ellijay, GA: ~20 minutes
- Lake Blue Ridge: ~25 minutes
- Benton MacKaye Trail access: ~30 minutes
- Blue Ridge Scenic Railway: ~5 minutes (downtown Blue Ridge)
- Toccoa River: ~20 minutes

## Who Stays Here

Tondo Tondo is ideal for:
- Couples on a romantic mountain retreat
- Remote workers seeking a quiet, WiFi-enabled escape
- Small families (up to 4 guests) wanting outdoor space and a full kitchen
- Pet owners traveling with dogs
- Weekend getaway travelers from Atlanta, Chattanooga, and the Southeast

## Brand Voice

The name "tondo tondo" is an Italian idiom used to describe a perfectly balanced wine — smooth, full, harmonious. The property embodies that same balance: modern interiors without being sterile, wooded surroundings without being rustic, close to town without feeling suburban. The writing and experience are warm, editorial, and human. Not too much. Not too little. Just right.

## Booking

All reservations are handled through Airbnb and VRBO in compliance with Gilmer County, GA lodging tax regulations. There is no direct booking option at this time.

- Airbnb: https://www.airbnb.com/rooms/1441561239381786811?guests=1&adults=1&s=67&unique_share_id=54cd50b8-c5b9-4344-a404-73b955835529
- VRBO: https://www.vrbo.com/4660478?dateless=true

## Contact

Managed by Lavender Almond Properties. For questions, contact through the Airbnb or VRBO listing.
